creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
The error message shows the failed include happens in Net/Server/Proto.pm.  In this case, it's a require that happens only when the host given isn't a bare port or IPv4 address.  The common use cases with postgrey are unix sockets and localhost, so this was a bug simply not hit until now.  The workaround is to manually install net/p5-IO-Socket-INET6; however, adding it as a dependency for postgrey would not be correct.

The correct fix is to add net/p5-IO-Socket-INET6 as a dependency to net/p5-Net-Server.  I've added the maintainer (perl@freebsd.org) to the CC list.
